name.zh: 一天一个苹果 - 医生远离我
name.en: An Apple a Day Keeps the Doctor Away

description.zh: 啊，是你呀？关心身体健康？这再好不过了。我这儿有好几种非常有效的进口疫苗，不过你懂我们现在的情况，买疫苗可真不容易，得花上很多钱。当然这取决于你自己，钱和命，哪个对你更重要……
description.en: Oh, it's you? Concerned about your health? Well, this is commendable. I have several very effective imported vaccinations, but you understand what situation we are all in, it was not easy to get them, and therefore they cost a lot. But it is up to you to decide what is more important to you, money or health...
